title: FIXATIVE FOR MOSQUITO LARVAE
author: Rochelly da Silva Mesquita

steps_raw.instruction: Accurately weigh 5.0 g of borax and dissolve it in 100 mL of distilled water. Then, add 10 mL of the formaldehyde solution and 2.5 mL of glycerol, mix and bring to volume of 1000 mL with distilled water.
